name: claude-cli-wrapper
description: Optimal MCP wrapper for the Claude Code CLI — single Rust binary exposing six tools (claude_execute, claude_session, claude_context, claude_review, claude_agent, claude_config) over both MCP stdio and a mcp-tool script fallback. Cross-platform launcher at bin/claude-cli-wrapper resolves to a per-host prebuilt (darwin-arm64 only at present; Linux/Intel fall through to cargo build, ~10-15 min first use). Ideal for any agent that needs to drive Claude Code programmatically.
